vocab_items.sentence: Her friends often tease her about it, but she doesn’t mind.
vocab_items.explanation: To joke with someone or make fun of them, often in a playful way.

vocab_items.sentence: Every day, she walks to school, to work, and even to the market when she needs groceries.
vocab_items.explanation: Food and other things you buy at a supermarket or market.

vocab_items.sentence: She doesn’t get tired easily and finds walking very relaxing.
vocab_items.explanation: Something that makes you feel calm and helps you rest.

vocab_items.sentence: She didn’t have an umbrella, so she decided to run home, even though she hated running.
vocab_items.explanation: A tool you hold over your head to keep yourself dry when it rains.

vocab_items.sentence: Veronica realized that she was enjoying it.
vocab_items.explanation: To suddenly understand or know something.
